description: Dutch public-tender CLI with offline search, document corpus, and the sub-threshold long tail TED never sees.

novel_features.name: Buyer dossier
novel_features.description: Full profile for one contracting authority: spending cadence, top CPVs, top procedures, active vs awarded vs cancelled counts over a window.

novel_features.name: Sub-threshold lead finder
novel_features.description: Filter notices to national-only AND below an estimated-value cap AND inside CPV stripes — the long-tail tenders that EU TED never sees.

novel_features.name: Closing-deadline view
novel_features.description: Lists notices closing within N days, grouped by day, with countdown plus buyer plus procedure filters.

novel_features.name: Watch saved query
novel_features.description: Persist a filter set; watch run returns only NEW notices since the cursor's last advance.

novel_features.name: CPV-drift over time
novel_features.description: Year-by-year top-CPV table for one buyer or NUTS region; shows whether a buyer's purchasing mix is shifting.

novel_features.name: TED cross-reference
novel_features.description: Extracts the canonical TED publication number from the eForms XML, prints it plus the TED URL.

novel_features.name: Tender-thread reconcile
novel_features.description: Walks PIN to CN to CAN to Modification chains for one buyer; flags orphan PINs, orphan CNs, and unresolved modifications.

novel_features.name: Buyer top-N aggregation
novel_features.description: Top contracting authorities by tender count for a CPV plus NUTS plus date slice.

novel_features.name: Document grep
novel_features.description: Streams documents from matching notices, runs a regex against PDF and Word text, prints pub_id, doc_id, line hits.

novel_features.name: Weekly notice velocity
novel_features.description: Weekly publication-count trend over the local snapshot; spot heating or cooling markets per CPV or buyer.

novel_features.name: Buyer concentration (HHI)
novel_features.description: Herfindahl-Hirschman index of award concentration for a CPV plus NUTS slice; tells you whether a market is dominated by one buyer or fragmented.

novel_features.name: Deadline-heat calendar
novel_features.description: Ranked calendar of expiring notices weighted by urgency times estimated value; daily prioritized view of what needs attention.
